title: spyridium obovatum
intro: Spyridium obovatum, also known as the green bird plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to Western Australia and is a shrub that produces small, greenish-yellow flowers and purple fruits. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Spyridium obovatum can be made into a poultice or infused in oil to be used topically, and it is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions, such as eczema and skin conditions.
